content: Confidence: 0.87. REVISE. BLOCKING: The spec defers the Phase 2 stretch goal (ConversationAgent abstract interface) without recording a decision. ADR-0006 says layer switching lives in agent_repository.dart, but abandoning the interface without a recorded decision creates an undocumented deviation. Add a decision note in the spec or a new ADR recording that ConversationAgent is not being extracted for Phase 3, with a Phase 5 re-evaluation note. ADVISORY (strong): AgentRepository owns connectivity detection + LLM fallback + rule-based logic = 3 responsibilities. Boundary violation vs established service/repository split. ADR-0006 endorses this but Phase 5 Layer C will overload the class. Add a forward-reference comment. ADVISORY: Define AgentResponse return type explicitly (content + AgentLayer enum). ADVISORY: Commit to --dart-define for environment config, document that anon key is not runtime-secret. ADVISORY: Clarify single Edge Function endpoint with mode discriminant vs two endpoints. INFO: isWaitingForAgent must be set during greeting fetch in startSession, not just sendMessage. Strengths: task ordering follows dependency graph correctly, anon-key stance is well-scoped, AgentRepository extension point pre-planned in Phase 1 code comments.

Confidence: 0.87. REVISE. BLOCKING (3 items): (1) Task 3 Edge Function needs input validation -- max payload size check and rate limiting acknowledgment or explicit risk acceptance. Unauthenticated anon key access means anyone with the APK can flood Claude API billing. (2) Task 5 must carry forward product brief TLS enforcement -- dio must not disable SSL verification, Edge Function URL validated as https at startup. (3) Task 3 must specify auth header format (Authorization: Bearer JWT) even though Phase 3 does not enforce it -- Phase 4 transition becomes a one-line change instead of structural addition. ADVISORY: Prompt injection is known risk for single-user Phase 3 but Phase 5 RAG creates stored injection vector -- document mitigation in spec. ADVISORY: String.fromEnvironment does not provide runtime secrecy for anon key -- document this distinction. ADVISORY: dio LogInterceptor must be conditional on kDebugMode -- never log request/response bodies in release builds. ADVISORY: Metadata parse failure handling must be explicit -- on failure, null all fields, complete session end normally. Trust boundaries analyzed: 5 boundaries identified (app-to-edge, edge-to-claude, claude-response, edge-response, app-to-sqlite). Strengths: API key architecture correct per ADR-0005, system prompt server-side injection is right pattern, offline fallback limits blast radius.

Confidence: 0.88. REVISE. BLOCKING (3 items): (1) Async promotion of AgentRepository will silently break existing tests -- un-awaited Futures in Dart satisfy expect(Future, isNotEmpty) without error. All existing agent_repository_test.dart assertions must be migrated to await. Spec Task 6 must include explicit migration note. (2) Edge Function has zero automated test coverage -- highest-risk component with manual-only testing. Add at minimum 4 Deno unit tests (happy path, error passthrough, malformed JSON, key non-leakage) or explicitly document as accepted gap. (3) Existing session_notifier_test.dart must override agentRepositoryProvider with mocks after Phase 3 -- real AgentRepository will check real connectivity making tests environment-dependent. ADVISORY: Add parameterized tests for malformed Claude responses (null response, empty string, wrong types, missing keys). ADVISORY: Test connectivity flapping mid-request (isOnline=true but dio throws connectionError). ADVISORY: Widget test for loading indicator needs explicit specification. ADVISORY: Metadata field assertions need specific parsed values not just null checks. ADVISORY: Environment config needs fallback behavior test when dart-define values absent. Edge cases identified: stale response after endSession, concurrent startSession guard preservation, empty string to sendMessage, Unicode in people names. Strengths: offline-first fallback enables deterministic test strategy, in-memory drift pattern is excellent, AC7 key absence as explicit criterion is good practice.

Phase 3 spec review complete. 3 specialists reviewed at HIGH risk. All 3 returned REVISE. 7 blocking findings identified and resolved in spec revision: (1) architecture-consultant: missing decision record for ConversationAgent deferral -- added Design Decision section. (2-4) security-specialist: Edge Function input validation, TLS enforcement, auth header format -- all added to constraints and tasks. (5-7) qa-specialist: async test migration plan, Edge Function automated tests, session notifier provider mocking -- added to tasks 6, 7, 10, and new Task 11. 12 advisory findings incorporated: AgentResponse return type, --dart-define commitment, single endpoint with mode, Phase 5 re-evaluation note, prompt injection documentation, logging restrictions, metadata parse failure handling, malformed response tests, connectivity flapping test, widget test specification, metadata assertion specificity, environment config fallback tests. Spec updated from 10 to 11 tasks. Status changed to reviewed.
